description_long: This object consists of two rectangular benches of different lengths, each featuring a flat wooden seat supported by a minimalist black metal frame. The benches have a modern, industrial design with clean lines and no visible backrests or armrests. The wooden surfaces appear smooth and well-finished, contrasting with the matte black metal bases that form open rectangular supports at each end. The benches are low to the ground and designed for communal or public seating, suitable for parks, plazas, or urban sidewalks. The construction suggests durability and weather resistance, making them ideal for high-traffic outdoor environments. The open frame design allows for easy cleaning and maintenance beneath the benches.
description: A pair of modern, rectangular benches with smooth wooden seats and black metal open-frame bases, designed for communal urban seating. The benches are low, backless, and feature a minimalist industrial style.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow profile and open rectangular metal frame of both benches, with the longer bench in front.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of both benches, highlighting the difference in their sizes and the open-frame metal bases.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, with the shorter bench in front and the open frames visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction of view 1, again showing both benches' lengths and minimalist structure.
